# .github/workflows/deploy.yml
name: Deploy to ECR

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Check secrets exist
        run: |
          if [ -z "$AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID" ]; then
            echo "SECRET IS EMPTY"
          else
            echo "SECRET EXISTS"
          fi
        env:
          AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
